headline: Solventum (SOLV) Stock Sees Split Analyst Revisions After Post Spin Margin Debate
summary: Solventum’s latest analyst update keeps the model fair value unchanged at US$82.15 per share, which is now being weighed against external price targets such as the bullish US$94 level. That gap mirrors the split in recent research, with some firms leaning into the post spin story and others trimming targets as they focus on execution risk and EBIT compression. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what signals to watch as the narrative around Solventum...
